In May, I wrote about the Celtics empowering Payton Pritchard even more and what that can do for them.

-3rd-most iso PPP
-4th-best AST/TO ratio (higher usage rate than the 3 ahead of him)
-5.9 points in the paint per game

1/2

items.title: Joan Beringer: "I never played the four before in my life, so it's a big change. But I feel good about [playing the fou] and playing with Rocco, so I'm very excited."
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt:
Joan Beringer: "I never played the four before in my life, so it's a big change. But I feel good about [playing the fou] and playing with Rocco, so I'm very excited."

Added that it requires him to switch more than he would on defense.

items.title: Something I was thinking about when Team USA kept trying to switch w/ Jay Huff:
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt:
Something I was thinking about when Team USA kept trying to switch w/ Jay Huff: 

The NBA averaged the most possessions w/ at least 3 offensive players crashing last season in the tracking era. Are switching bigs as valuable the more teams value possession maxxing?
